name: USS Lyman (DE 302)
events: 4 Jul 1944 During 4/5 July 1944, USS Sailfish (T/Cdr. R.E.M. Ward, USN), USS Greenling (T/Cdr. J.D. Gerwick, USN) and USS Billfish (T/Cdr. V.C. Turner, USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor together with USS Le Hardy (Lt.Cdr. E.L. Holtz, USNR), USS Charles R. Greer (Lt.Cdr. W.T. Denton, USNR) and USS Lyman (Lt.Cdr. J.W. Wilson, USNR). These included night exercises. (1)

11 Jul 1944 During 11/12 July 1944, USS Bowfin (T/Cdr. J. Corbus, USN) and USS Hardhead (T/Cdr. F. McMaster, USN) conducted exercises off Pearl Harbor with USS Carlson (Lt.Cdr. J.A. Stapleton, USNR) and USS Lyman (Lt.Cdr. J.W. Wilson, USNR). These included night exercises.
